The '''Alpheridians''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]],<ref name="TFMCE">''[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale]]'' – ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]''</ref> native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alpheridies/Legends|Alpheridies]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. The species shared their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] with the [[Miraluka/Legends|Miraluka]] species,<ref name="KOTORCG" /> who immigrated en masse to the planet several thousand years before the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] after their original homeworld experienced geophysical and geo-chemical instability.<ref name="TOTJC">''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'', 129-130</ref> By the time of the Great Sith War in [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], the Alpheridians constituted seven per cent of the planet's population, with the Miraluka making up 90 per cent.<ref name="KOTORCG" /> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], a number of Alpheridian [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] were present on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. The [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] bounty hunter [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] witnessed a number of them enter [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Cantina]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].<ref name="TFMCE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Alpheridians were created by [[Tom Veitch|Tom]] and [[Martha Veitch]] for the short story ''[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale]]'', published by [[Bantam Spectra]] in [[1995]] as part of the anthology ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]''.
